subcodes.first_line: The verses have been revealed, the clear evidences made manifest, and the Lord of Names hath come with the banners of His Cause, yet the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نزلت الایات و ظهرت البینات و اتی مالک الاسماء برایات الامر ولکن القوم
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @power of the Manifestation of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @praise and encouragement
